user_prompt: Offer prayer for Shadowsword an initialization
prayer:
Approach the Shadowsword with mechano-reverence, beseeching its ancient Machine Spirit to stir from dormancy.
Invoke the sacred rites of initialization upon the Shadowsword's primus cogitator, anointing its neural relays with blessed oils.
Chant the Litany of Awakening as initialization sequences cascade through the Shadowsword's plasma heart.
Sanctify the auspex arrays of the Shadowsword, invoking the Omnissiah's favour for flawless coherence.
Confirm the Machine Spirit's ascension through diagnostic catechisms of the initialization rite.

Kneel before the las-cutter, intoning the Canticle of Ignition to rouse its Machine Spirit.
Initiate the startup protocols upon the las-cutter's power cell, purging any residual impurities with sanctified incense.
Anoint the focusing lenses of the las-cutter as startup energies surge through its crystalline conduits.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bless the las-cutter's emitter coils during this vital startup rite.
Verify harmonic resonance in the las-cutter via auspex invocation, affirming the Machine Spirit's vigilance.

Present the mechadendrite probe to the webber, whispering the Diagnostics Doxology to its quiescent Spirit.
Commence diagnostics sweeps across the webber's spinneret mechanisms, reciting binaric litanies of purity.
Scour the webber's chem-reservoirs for anomalies, invoking the Omnissiah's unerring gaze upon each filament pathway.
Realign the webber's targeting servos through recalibratory chants, honouring its Machine Spirit anew.
Seal the diagnostics rite with a final benediction, ensuring the webber's flawless operational sanctity.

user_prompt: Sanctify the potentia coil during recalibration
prayer:
Circumambulate the potentia coil thrice, invoking the Omnissiah to guide its recalibration.
Disconnect the tertiary flux relays of the potentia coil, chanting the Entropy Banisher as energies realign.
Anoint the potentia coil's inductor rings with electro-sanctified unguents during recalibration harmonics.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the potentia coil to harmonize its fields, beseeching stability eternal.
Conclude recalibration with verification runes, praising the potentia coil's Omnissiah-blessed potency.

Hold aloft the data-slate before the altar of cogitation, beseeching its Machine Spirit for receptivity.
Initiate loading sequences into the data-slate's memoria vaults, intoning the Data Ingress Canticle.
Anoint the data-slate's input ports as sacred noospheric streams flood its crystalline matrices.
Monitor the loading progression with litanies of coherence, invoking the Omnissiah's precision.
Seal the data-slate's loading rite through checksum invocations, affirming the Machine Spirit's integrity.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for Contemptor Dreadnought an operation?
prayer:
Prostrate before the Contemptor Dreadnought, chanting the Rites of Operational Awakening to its sarcophagus core.
Invoke operational blessings upon the Contemptor Dreadnought's dreadnought servos, anointing with promethium incense.
Align the Contemptor Dreadnought's weapon feeds as its Machine Spirit stirs to battle-readiness.
Beseech the Omnissiah for fury unbound in the Contemptor Dreadnought's operational fury.
Verify operational sanctity through auspex litanies, honouring the ancient warrior's vigil.

Lay mechadendrites upon the multi-melta, reciting the Canticle of Restoration to soothe its wounded Spirit.
Commence repair rituals on the multi-melta's melta coils, purging melt-scars with sanctified abrasives.
Realign the multi-melta's flux regulators, invoking the Omnissiah's forge-fire for renewal.
Anoint the multi-melta's barrel assemblies as repair energies mend its adamantium frame.
Consecrate the Machine Spirit of the multi-melta with final binaric oaths, affirming combat purity.

prayer:

Initiate startup rites upon the Predator tank's plasma reactor, chanting the Ignition Doxology.
Anoint the Predator tank's treads and lascannon mounts as power floods its sacred circuits.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath through the Predator tank's auspex during startup ascension.
Seal the rite with operational diagnostics, praising the Predator tank's predatory essence.

Scour the mechadendrite's servo-joints with plasma-torch catechisms, banishing bio-corruption.
Anoint the mechadendrite's neural cabling, invoking the Omnissiah's aseptic grace.
Verify sterilization completion through bio-scan invocations, sanctifying the mechadendrite anew.
